ANY REPLY IS DUE BY AUGUST 31, 2022. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR DETAILS.) JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING ON WRIT OF MANDATE

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar as moot. On September 7, 2022, the court granted an anti-SLAPP motion that dismissed the action.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Special Motin To Strike Pursuant Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16
Off Calendar Sep-07-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Petitioner EVE DEL CASTELLO (Tel: 415-282-0894) in pro per;
Atty. BRIAN T. HILDRETH, Esq. of Bell, McAndrews & Hiltachk, LLP (Tel: 916-442-7757) for Respondent John Dennis, Chairman of the San Francisco Republican County Central Committee (via Zoom videoconference).

HEARING RE: RESPONDENT JOHN DENNIS, CHAIRMAN OF THE SAN FRANCISCO REPUBLICAN COUNTY CENTRAL COMMITTEE'S Special Motion To Strike Pursuant Code Of Civil Procedure Section 425.16.

The Court notes the petitioner did not provide notice of her intent to contest the Court's tentative ruling.

Matter discussed.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion is granted. No opposition filed and the case is dismissed. The amended petition for writ of mandate filed on August 15, 2022, does not moot this motion. A party cannot avoid a pending anti-SLAPP motion by filing an amended pleading. (See Salma v. Capon (2008) 161 Cal.App.4th 1275, 1294; Simmons v. Allstate Ins. Co. (2001) 2 Cal. App. 4th 1068, 1073-74.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

Hearing On Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-10-2022 Continued To Sep-08-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. BRIAN T. HILDRETH, Esq. of Bell, McAndrews & Hiltachk, LLP (Tel: 916-442-7757) for respondent John Dennis, Chairman of the San Francisco Republican County Central Committee (dba The San Francisco Republican Party);
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING ON PETITIONER EVE DEL CASTELLO'S PETITIONER FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.

Matter not contested/argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The hearing on this "writ of mandate" is continued to September 8, 2022. Petitioner's papers do not adequately inform the court what the petition is about. For example, the petition and the "points and authorities" are each less than one page long and, notwithstanding its title, the latter cites no authority.

Petitioner shall file proper points and authorities by August 17, 2022. Any opposition is due by August 25, 2022. Any reply is due by August 31, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
